creator: vedran@miletic.net
text: Created attachment 244026 Patch In bug 268977 I got my consulting service RxTx added to the list. Due to diverging interests, my co-founder and I decided to amicably split up some weeks ago and decided that neither of us is going to use the original name. Therefore, I would kindly ask you to replace the RxTx entry with [[consulting]] id = "miletic" category = "europe" name = "Miletic" url = "https://www.miletic.net/" description = "Miletic offers scientific software development, maintenance, integration, and deployment services. Specific expertise is the cross-platform porting of scientific applications and libraries, including from and to FreeBSD. Contact via our website www.miletic.net or byemail info@miletic.net." Patch is attached for convenience.
